---
title: "Print Reporting"
---



[Medill News Service](https://medillonthehill.medill.northwestern.edu/2026/01/lawmakers-struggle-to-find-consensus-on-health-care-reforms/)


[CM](https://www.columbiamissourian.com/news/local/opponents-of-median-safety-ordinance-protest-rule-as-ban-goes-into-effect/article_0f61af59-ff8d-40c5-a851-5e8c1ab5e953.html)


[CM](https://www.columbiamissourian.com/news/higher_education/mizzou-sunsets-paws-program-after-three-years/article_c67be79a-cc57-40dd-9198-133324750dd9.html)

[HC](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1LQch5F4rsW5yRzvB8sfQ6B69VlPvIqGR/view)

[Medill trial monitors](https://www.medilltrialmonitors.com/p/smart-combats-substance-use-disorder)

[Daily NU](https://dailynorthwestern.com/2025/10/14/campus/northwestern-celebrates-newly-minted-nobel-prize-winner-prof-joel-mokyr-at-monday-press-conference/)

[Daily NU](https://dailynorthwestern.com/2025/04/16/lateststories/some-nu-jewish-faculty-criticize-trump-administrations-efforts-to-curtail-antisemitism/)

[UPI](https://www.upi.com/Top_News/US/2026/03/04/supreme-court-broker-liability-truckers/6961772659966/)
